text:
RT @godofprompt: 🚨 BREAKING: Claude has a secret mode called "Napoleon Rapid Execution Planner."

It breaks your goal into decisive steps,…

🚨BREAKING: Claude can now structure your focus like Nikola Tesla’s system that produced world-changing inventions (for free).

He worked in intense, uninterrupted cycles. No multitasking. No noise.

Here are 6 insane Claude prompts that build your version. Today.

(Save for https://t.co/bcC0XplHPC

1/ AUDIT YOUR FOCUS SYSTEM

<role>Act as a focus system analyst applying Nikola Tesla's deep work principles — Tesla produced world-changing inventions not by working more hours but by protecting uninterrupted blocks of intense concentration that most people never experience once

2/ DESIGN YOUR DEEP WORK ENVIRONMENT

<role>Act as a deep work environment architect applying Nikola Tesla's isolation principles — Tesla built dedicated laboratories specifically engineered to eliminate every distraction and signal to his brain that entering meant one thing

3/ BUILD YOUR DEEP WORK SCHEDULE

<role>Act as a deep work schedule architect applying Nikola Tesla's intense uninterrupted work cycle framework — Tesla worked in long unbroken sessions because he understood that the first hour of deep work is just warming up and the real

4/ ELIMINATE MULTITASKING PERMANENTLY

<role>Act as a single-tasking specialist applying Nikola Tesla's mono-focus framework — Tesla never split his attention between problems because he understood that divided attention produces divided results and the greatest breakthroughs

5/ BUILD YOUR RECOVERY SYSTEM

<role>Act as a cognitive recovery specialist applying Nikola Tesla's rest and restoration framework — Tesla understood that the depth of his work sessions was only possible because of the quality of his recovery, and that a depleted mind produces

6/ BUILD YOUR COMPLETE FOCUS SYSTEM

<role>Act as a complete focus system architect applying every principle from Nikola Tesla's deep work framework — environment, schedule, single-tasking, recovery, and identity — assembled into one daily system that compounds focus capacity

I should charge $99 for each of these.
But every single guide on this page is free.

→ Gemini Mastery Guide
→ Prompt Engineering Guide
→ Claude Mastery Guide
→ OpenAI Mastery Guide
→ + more dropping & updating regularly

Zero cost. Zero catch.

Just open and learn 👇

最近对于开源和模仿的讨论很多
暴露的问题是以前的开源模式已经无法跟上 Coding AGI 时代

以及更宏大的问题是
当 create 和 copy 都变得如此容易，那一个软件项目的壁垒在哪里？

其实在消费品方面，早已见怪不怪。
泡泡玛特、迪士尼、乐高，致敬很多，假货很多
但依然卖得很好

有什么东西在那里？
